January 11, 1990
Kathryn Donovan
Legal Division Fair Political Practice Commission
428 J Street, #800
Sacramento, CA 95814
Dear Ms. Donovan:
I am writing you'in regards to the city of Carson's concern over how,
or if, Proposition 78 would affect a cable presentation involving elected
officials.
Our city plans to do a state-of-the-c'ity type of program involving our
city's elected officials addressing local concerns for the benefit of
commun'ity residents. However, four of the elected official s are up
for reelection in April. The city runs a similar program wjth city
staff explaining what their departments do and how they affect citizens.
I would appreciate any advice or information that you could provide
the city for this type of situation. Please feel free to contact me
at 213-830-7600, ext. 315 if you need any further information, or have
any questions.
Thank you for your attention to this manner and I look forward to hearing
from you.
Regards,

sections.question: How, or if, would Proposition 78 affect a cable presentation involving elected officials who are up for reelection in April, where the city plans to do a state-of-the-city type program with elected officials addressing local concerns?
sections.question_synthetic: The City of Carson seeks guidance on whether Proposition 78 would restrict or regulate a cable television program featuring elected officials discussing city matters when some of those officials are facing reelection.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming request letter from City of Carson to FPPC, not an FPPC response. No formal QUESTION/CONCLUSION sections present. Document is a request for advice regarding Proposition 78 compliance. Some text degradation in scanned document affects confidence slightly.

embedding.qa_text: QUESTION: How, or if, would Proposition 78 affect a cable presentation involving elected officials who are up for reelection in April, where the city plans to do a state-of-the-city type program with elected officials addressing local concerns?
